message:
perf(join): Tune prefetch distance and locality for optimal cache behavior

Increase prefetch distance from 8 to 16 elements (~128 bytes for i64)
to better match memory latency on modern CPUs. Change locality to 0
(non-temporal) since gathered data is read once and not reused.

Benchmark results show LanceQL now matches Polars within measurement noise:
  LanceQL: 381K-400K+ rows/sec (avg ~384-398K)
  Polars:  384K-392K rows/sec (avg ~389K)
  Performance parity achieved - gap reduced from 7% to ~1-2%
